description.sv: Mangomarinerad kycklingfilé, ris, salladsmix, avokado, mango, koriander, papaya, cashewnötter, rostade sesamfrön, friterad lök, nötmix & currymajonnäs.
description.en: Mango-marinated chicken fillet, rice, salad mix, avocado, mango, coriander, papaya, cashews, toasted sesame, fried onion, nut mix & curry mayo.
